title: Confession.
content:
Confession twofold is, as Austin says,
    The first of sin is, and the next of praise.
    If ill it goes with thee, thy faults confess:
    If well, then chant God's praise with cheerfulness.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Confession."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
